title: Tempest. A Quatrain.
content:
With helms of lightning, glittering in the skies,
 On steeds of thunder, cloudy form on form,
 Terrific beauty in their hair and eyes,
 Behold the wild Valkyries of the storm.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Tempest. A Quatrain.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
